WELCOME TO Stellar Institute

At Stellar Institute, we believe every student deserves the right environment to learn, grow, and succeed. From quality school education to professional skill-based courses, we provide a complete learning pathway,  one that builds knowledge, character, and real-world readiness.

CTA Button: Read More

ADD ALL CARDS

 Why Choose Stellar Institute

Expert Faculty: Learn from qualified, experienced teachers who are dedicated to your academic and professional growth.

Modern Labs: Hands-on learning with up-to-date technology and equipment built for practical, real-world skill development.

Certifications: Earn recognized certifications that strengthen your profile and open doors to better career opportunities.

Disciplined Environment: A safe, structured, and focused atmosphere where students can learn with confidence and clarity.

Separate Classes for Boys & Girls: A comfortable and respectful learning environment designed to maximize concentration and academic performance.

Regular Tests & Performance Tracking: Consistent assessments and progress monitoring to keep every student on the path to success.

Job Placement Support: We don't just train you, we connect you with real opportunities and help you step confidently into your career.

Affordable & Accessible: Quality education and professional training made accessible for every student and family.

2. ABOUT STELLAR ACADEMY

Label: About Us

Heading: Shaping Bright Minds Since Day One

At Stellar Academy, we believe education is more than textbooks and exams. We provide a structured, nurturing environment where every student receives individual attention, strong academic preparation, and the values needed to succeed in life. From Middle School to Intermediate, our programs are designed to build a solid foundation for every stage of your child's future.

CTA Button: Learn More

3. OUR PROGRAMS

(Already done — Middle School, Matriculation, Intermediate)

4. WHY CHOOSE STELLAR ACADEMY

Label: Our Strengths Heading: Why Parents & Students Trust Stellar Academy

Qualified & Dedicated Teachers Our faculty brings subject expertise and genuine care for every student's progress and well-being.

Result-Oriented Preparation. From past paper practice to regular test series, our academic system is built around real results.

Individual Student Attention Small class sizes and personal monitoring ensure no student is left behind.

Separate Classes for Boys & Girls A focused and respectful learning environment designed for better concentration and comfort.

Safe & Disciplined Environment A campus culture built on respect, discipline, and positive academic habits.

Regular Assessments & Progress Reports Weekly tests and monthly performance tracking keep students and parents informed at every step.

5. ADMISSIONS PROCESS

Label: How to Enroll Heading: Simple Steps to Get Started

Step 1 — Apply. Fill out the admission form online or visit our campus at 1-Montgomery Road, Lahore.

Step 2 — Assessment: Students appear for a short entry assessment to help us place them in the right class level.

Step 3 — Confirmation: Receive your admission confirmation and fee details from our admissions team.

Step 4 — Start Learning: Join your class and begin your journey toward academic excellence.

Privacy Policy Content

Stellar Institute

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: [Insert Date]

At Stellar Institute, we value the trust you place in us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect the personal information of students, parents, guardians, and visitors across our website and admissions process spanning Stellar Academy, Stellar Skilled Institute, and Stellar School/College.

Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

Personal Information

  • Full name, date of birth, and gender
  • Parent/guardian name and contact details
  • Phone number and email address
  • Home address
  • CNIC/B-Form number (for admissions and verification purposes)
  • Academic records and previous school/institute details

Course & Enrollment Information

  • Course or program of interest
  • Class level or grade
  • Payment and fee details (processed securely; we do not store full card details)

Website Usage Information

  • IP address and browser type
  • Pages visited and time spent on our website
  • Cookies and similar tracking technologies (see Section 5)

How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Process admissions and course enrollments
  • Communicate with students and parents regarding classes, fees, results, and events
  • Verify identity and eligibility for enrollment
  • Improve our website, courses, and overall student experience
  • Send updates about new courses, offers, or institutional announcements (only where consent is given)
  • Maintain academic records and track student performance
  • Support job placement assistance for Stellar Skilled Institute students
  • Comply with legal and regulatory requirements

How We Protect Your Information

We take reasonable administrative and technical measures to protect personal information from unauthorized access, misuse, alteration, or disclosure. Access to student and family records is limited to authorized staff who need it to perform their duties.

While we work to safeguard your data, no method of online transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we encourage families to share sensitive information through official Stellar Institute channels only.

Sharing of Information

We do not sell, rent, or trade personal information to third parties.

We may share limited information only in the following circumstances:

  • With faculty and administrative staff for academic and operational purposes
  • With payment processors, solely to complete fee transactions
  • With potential employers or partner organizations, only for students enrolled in job placement programs and only with the student's consent
  • When required by law, regulation, or a valid request from government authorities

Cookies & Website Tracking

Our website may use cookies to improve the browsing experience, understand visitor behavior, and remember preferences. You can disable cookies through your browser settings; however, some website features may not function properly if cookies are disabled.

Children's Privacy

Stellar Academy and Stellar School/College serve students from Grade 5 through Intermediate, some of whom are minors. Where a student is under 18, we collect and process personal information through the student's parent or legal guardian, who provides consent on the student's behalf during admission.

Your Rights

Parents, guardians, and adult students may:

  • Request access to the personal information we hold
  • Request corrections to inaccurate or outdated information
  • Request that we stop sending promotional communications
  • Withdraw consent for optional data uses (such as marketing), without affecting core enrollment services

Data Retention

We retain personal and academic information for as long as necessary to fulfill enrollment, academic, and legal record-keeping obligations, or as required by applicable regulations. Records may be retained beyond a student's graduation or withdrawal for reference and verification purposes.

Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please reach out to us:

Stellar Institute

1-Montgomery Road, Lahore

Phone: 0300-0652124

Website: www.stellarinstitute.pk

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. Any updates will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date.

Tag: Stellar Academy — Matric · Intermediate · O & A Levels

Where Hard Work Turns Into Top Grades

Focused board exam preparation, disciplined test sessions, and mentorship built to help every student reach their highest grades without losing sight of who they're becoming.

Button: Secure Admission      View Classes

9th – 12th

Classes Covered

Boys & Girls

Separate Sections

Weekly

Test Sessions

Board-Aligned

Curriculum

A Track for Every Board Exam Ahead

From Matric to Intermediate and beyond, every class is built around the exams that matter most, with teaching paced to the board's own timeline.

9th – 10th

Matric

Science & Arts groups, taught to the board syllabus with continuous assessment.

  • Science Group
  • Arts / General Group
  • Subject-wise weak-area coaching

11th – 12th

Intermediate (FSc / ICS / Commerce)

Pre-Medical, Pre-Engineering, ICS, and Commerce streams with entry-test relevant coaching.

  • Pre-Medical & Pre-Engineering
  • ICS
  • Commerce / I.Com

O / A LEVEL

Cambridge O & A Levels

Subject-specific support aligned with Cambridge assessment objectives and past-paper practice.

  • O Level core & elective subjects
  • A Level (Sciences, Commerce, Humanities)
  • Past-paper-based practice

Test Sessions & Performance Tracking

Consistent Testing. Visible Progress.

Regular, structured assessments, so no student's weak spot goes unnoticed until it's too late.

WEEKLY

Class Tests

Short, subject-wise tests after every unit to reinforce what's just been taught.

MONTHLY

Progress Assessments

Full-syllabus-to-date tests with detailed performance reports shared with parents.

PRE-BOARD

Mock Board Exams

Full-length papers under timed, exam-hall conditions before the actual boards.

ONGOING

Performance Tracking

Individual student trend reports, so improvement or a dip is caught early.
